sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77935" key="paradiorqo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραδιορθ-όω</orth>, <sense id="n77935.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">alter for the worse</tr_>, of stolen verses, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:10:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
